caption:
Yes! This is in Umm Al Quwain! 🤎

📍 @mikoko.uaq near Mangrove Beach
🛖 African-style restaurant in the middle of the mangroves
💕 We went there for breakfast, so we had acai bowl (45 AED) and Eggs Ben (65 AED).
🎟️ Keep your restaurant receipt to waive entrance fee of 20 AED/car.

Worth the trip? Totally! So tag your adventure buddies now! 🥰
